name: Baked Flatbread with Garlic (Lahsooni Naan)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Olive oil or melted ghee
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine flour, baking soda, cream of tartar, and salt.
2. Set aside.
3. Whisk together water and egg replacer in another bowl.
4. In the same bowl, mix the egg replacer, soymilk, and canola oil until combined.
5. Add the flour mixture to the soymilk mixture and stir until a dough forms a ball. Knead briefly, then place the dough in a greased bowl and cover with a damp towel. Let it rest in a warm, draft-free area for 2-1/2 to 3 hours.
6. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C). Lightly oil baking sheets.
7. Saute garlic in olive oil for 2 minutes. Set aside.
8. Lightly coat hands with vegetable oil and knead the dough on a lightly floured surface until smooth, about 3 minutes. Divide the dough into 12 equal pieces and roll each into a ball. Flatten each ball with your hands, then roll into an oval about 3/8 inch thick and stretch the ends to form a teardrop shape (wide at the base and tapering to a point on top).
9. Place the naan on baking sheets and brush with garlic oil.
10. Bake in the middle rack of the oven for 6 to 8 minutes.
